name: Chewelah Golf and Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Chewelah Golf and Country Club in Chewelah, WA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Jeff Weeman Memorial Courts
description: Jeff Weeman Memorial Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Colville, WA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Jenkins Jr. High School
description: Jenkins Jr. High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chewelah, WA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Loon Lake School District
description: Loon Lake School District is a place to play pickleball in Loon Lake, WA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Spokane Community College Colville Campus
description: Spokane Community College Colville Campus is a place to play pickleball in Colville, WA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A membership is required to play.
